retry_reason: Failure can be due to permission checks (VM_ALWAYS_VALID) or TTM setup failures, which are not transient; retrying would not succeed without changing the bo's flags or system state.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to export an amdgpu GEM object as a dma-buf, which involves validation (user mm, VM_ALWAYS_VALID), TTM setup (ttm_bo_setup_export), and overriding ops after calling drm_gem_prime_export. The refcount increment via drm_gem_prime_export is one step within broader business logic, not the sole or primary focus.
